description: Fix posts 2 and 4 in data/content_plan_20260312_EN.json — they don't match Meruru's core concept. Steps: 1) Read data/content_plan_20260312_EN.json to see current posts 2 and 4. 2) Read config/meruru_concept.md and config/image_prompt_guide.md. 3) Read data/strategy_20260312.json for slot/category/time info. 4) Spawn Creator to regenerate ONLY posts 2 and 4 with: correct Meruru concept alignment (character, voice, NG list), full image_prompt objects matching the 2026-03-11 quality standard (all fields: meta, subject, outfit, pose, scene, camera, lighting, mood with rich detail), correct EN rules (zero hashtags, under 30 chars caption). 5) Update only posts 2 and 4 in the content plan file, preserving all other posts. 6) Send Telegram with updated posts summary.
notes: Critical: Creator MUST output full detailed image_prompt objects with all fields (tool, prompt 150+ words, negative_prompt, aspect_ratio, meta, subject, outfit, pose, scene, camera, lighting, mood). Use data/content_plan_20260311_EN.json as the quality reference for image prompts. Posts 2 and 4 must align with Meruru character lock and voice from config/meruru_concept.md. Preserve posts 1, 3, 5 unchanged.
